creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Trying to rebuild and install both via make and poudriere port net-mgmt/net-snmp fail to configure with the error shown below. This problem occurs on ports tree at revision r482730 on CURRENT FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT r339441 amd64:

[...]
checking for dlopen... (cached) yes
checking for and configuring mib modules to use... configure: WARNING: mib module conflict
configure: WARNING: mib module 'host' is both included and excluded. It will be excluded
default_modules disman/event-mib mibII/mta_sendmail mibII/tcpTable sctp-mib smux ucd-snmp/diskio.
 default_modules disman/event-mib mibII/mta_sendmail mibII/tcpTable sctp-mib smux ucd-snmp/diskio snmpv3mibs mibIIconfigure: WARNING: mib module error
configure: WARNING: mib module 'ucd_snmp' requires module 'ucd-snmp/memory' but someone told me to compile without it
 ucd_snmp notification notification-log-mib target agent_mibs agentx disman/event disman/schedule utilities mibII/ipconfigure: WARNING: mib module error
configure: error: mib module "sctp-mib/sctpScalars" requires module "sctp-mib/scalars-unknown-arch" but sctp-mib/scalars-unknown-arch.h or sctp-mib/scalars-unknown-arch.c could not be found in ./agent/mibgroup
===>  Script "configure" failed unexpectedly.
Please report the problem to zi@FreeBSD.org [maintainer] and attach the
"/usr/ports/net-mgmt/net-snmp/work/net-snmp-5.7.3/config.log" including the
output of the failure of your make command. Also, it might be a good idea to
provide an overview of all packages installed on your system (e.g. a
/usr/local/sbin/pkg-static info -g -Ea).
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/net-mgmt/net-snmp
*** Error code 1
